title: CRISPR Therapeutics AG (CRSP) Reports Q2 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Q2 2024 Earnings Analysis. Financial Performance: CRISPR Therapeutics reported earnings of -$1.49 per share for the quarter ending June 2024, versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of -$1.37 per share. The company delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -8.76% and 93.84%, respectively. Q2 2024 Results: Net loss was $126.4 million, compared to $77.7 million in Q2 2023. However, R&D expenses decreased to $80.2 million from $101.6 million year-over-year. Financial Position: The company maintained a strong financial position with $2 billion in cash and equivalents as of June 30, 2024. Pipeline and Business Updates: CEO Samarth Kulkarni noted continued momentum of CASGEVY's launch, with more than 35 authorized treatment centers activated globally as of mid-July. Approximately 20 patients had cells collected across all regions. The company reported progress across its pipeline, including advancement of the next generation CD19-directed CAR T cell program CTX112, opening of a clinical trial for CTX131 in hematologic malignancies, and dose-escalation continuing with in vivo programs CTX310 and CTX320.
